task: T4 — neutral/balanced lighting at GENERATION (not post-grade)
problem: Model emits warm-skew / blue-deficit host pixels (R≈215 G≈208 B≈138; yg≈0.007). Post-grade neutral WB cannot recover missing blue channel.
generation_fix: Re-prompt at video.generate — forbid warm key, mandate balanced bilateral 5500K with explicit RGB parity language.
lighting_block: LIGHTING LOCK Neutral-Balanced-5500K: bilateral soft keys left+right at equal 5500K intensity — no warm gel, no tungsten practical, no amber rim, no single-side orange key. Shadow fill neutral grey (#9A9A98 family), not brown. Skin tone natural caucasian-neutral: equal RGB midtones ±8%, blue channel preserved — forbid yellow-green skin push, forbid orange warmth, forbid blue-starved shadows (B channel must not collapse below 65% of min(R,G) on face). Backdrop locked #9A9A98±2%.
color_block: COLOR LOCK Balanced-Neutral: presenter skin midtones R≈G≈B within 8% — no warm cast, no cool teal fill, no vintage fade. Grey seamless reads true neutral, not cream. Wardrobe colors accurate, not oversaturated.
